race.comment: SUTTON VELLA (3) was too good here last time out and steps out to 1280m now,  though that doesn't appear a problem. She should be well placed from the barrier draw and if she can run up to the figure she produced last time, she will take beating. CRAVING MAGIC (1) missed fresh when the race favourite and doesn't boast the strongest second-up record. He's unbeaten at this track and trip however and he's likely to put his best foot forward. TAVOLO (5) comes here on the fresh side and boasts a strong first-up record. Won't be far away. MISS JENNIFER (2) can improve coming back to a more suitable race today.
